title: TripStatus
description: Trip-specific status for the arriving transit vehicle.

activeTripId.description: Trip ID of the trip the vehicle is actively serving.

blockTripSequence.description: Index of the active trip into the sequence of trips for the active block.

closestStop.description: ID of the closest stop to the current location of the transit vehicle.

closestStopTimeOffset.description: Time offset from the closest stop to the current position of the transit vehicle (in seconds).

distanceAlongTrip.description: Distance, in meters, the transit vehicle has progressed along the active trip.

frequency.description: Information about frequency-based scheduling, if applicable to the trip.

lastKnownDistanceAlongTrip.description: Last known distance along the trip received in real-time from the transit vehicle.

lat.description: Latitude of the last known location of the transit vehicle.

lon.description: Longitude of the last known location of the transit vehicle.

lastKnownLocation.description: Last known location of the transit vehicle (optional).

lastKnownOrientation.description: Last known orientation value received in real-time from the transit vehicle.

lastLocationUpdateTime.description: Timestamp of the last known real-time location update from the transit vehicle.

lastUpdateTime.description: Timestamp of the last known real-time update from the transit vehicle.

nextStop.description: ID of the next stop the transit vehicle is scheduled to arrive at.

nextStopTimeOffset.description: Time offset from the next stop to the current position of the transit vehicle (in seconds).

occupancyCapacity.description: Capacity of the transit vehicle in terms of occupancy.

occupancyCount.description: Current count of occupants in the transit vehicle.

occupancyStatus.description: Current occupancy status of the transit vehicle.

orientation.description: Orientation of the transit vehicle, represented as an angle in degrees.

phase.description: Current journey phase of the trip.

lat.description: Latitude of the current position of the transit vehicle.

lon.description: Longitude of the current position of the transit vehicle.

position.description: Current position of the transit vehicle.

predicted.description: Indicates if real-time arrival info is available for this trip.

scheduleDeviation.description: Deviation from the schedule in seconds (positive for late, negative for early).

scheduledDistanceAlongTrip.description: Distance, in meters, the transit vehicle is scheduled to have progressed along the active trip.

serviceDate.description: Time, in milliseconds since the Unix epoch, of midnight for the start of the service date for the trip.

situationIds.description: References to situation elements (if any) applicable to this trip.

status.description: Current status modifiers for the trip.

totalDistanceAlongTrip.description: Total length of the trip, in meters.

vehicleId.description: ID of the transit vehicle currently serving the trip.
